hotel_name: DoubleTree by Hilton Hotel Bloomington - Minneapolis South

reviews.title: NOT how the pictures looked
reviews.text:
Pro:
Seemingly good deal

Con:
Dirty, windows had oily smudges on them, office chair looked like it had a poop stain on it
NO food or room service and the
Pool was closed and none of that was in the hotel info

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: No  Water pressure in the 18th floor or so they gave room in.
reviews.negatives: Very old and times were falling off in the bathroom

reviews.title: Strategic Location
reviews.text: Strategically located near MSP Intl Airport. Large and clean room, although consider dated and need refurbishment

reviews.title: Go somewhere else.
reviews.negatives:
Paper thin walls and constant road construction led to a very rough sleep.
No smoking room reeked of pot smoke.  Room was also dirty

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything was excellent except the rooms were dirty with dust and the floor wasn’t vacuumed properly.
reviews.room_type: 2 Doubles Mobility Accessibl - Roll In Shower

reviews.title: Toilet flooded within two minutes of being in room and when I requested a new room the front desk became argumentative o
reviews.positives: Dirty, staff very rude, toilet flooded room on first use
reviews.negatives: Staff very rude and hotel dirty

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Room great.  Staff great.   Walls thin with loud neighbors

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: Went here for the weekend with the grandkids and they had a good time!  Pool could have been a bit warmer!

reviews.title: Disappointment
reviews.positives:
Was given horrible customer service and
Was charged again for full amount of room even after
I already paid
Booking .com
reviews.negatives:
Was to much of
A hassle and to much stress

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text:
As with most places these days, the hotel is understaffed. However, the staff that is there, from the front desk to the restaurant to the bar is exceptional!  Nick and his staff at the reception desk were the best, without exception! Brad, who worked in the restaurant along with the other staff were wonderful! John and Fernando, in the bar, we’re so much fun to visit with and did an amazing job keeping up with the workload. There was also a young woman from Croatia who was a server. She was awesome too!
Our room was clean and comfortable. The air conditioner was pretty tired though.

reviews.title: Very dirty room.
reviews.negatives: Room was dirty. Looked like they only changed the sheets (hopefully). Bedside tables were sticky and floor was dirty, shower curtain was brown.

reviews.title: Home Away from Home
reviews.text:
Our mother lives a few miles from this hotel, so we started staying here several years ago when we come to visit. 
It has become like a 2nd home to us. The staff has remained consistent , which is unusual in today’s world, so we’ve gotten to know them very well. Nick and his staff at the desk are friendly and efficient and go above and beyond. Brad and Deanna in the dining room are amazing! Joel, who is the main bartender and his sidekick  Biana are so much fun and do a great job. Then there’s Gabby, who runs the Starbucks store in the main entrance. What a doll!!
We won’t stay anywhere else.

reviews.title: Costly stay
reviews.negatives:
The fact that I parked my car in their lot and my catalytic converter was stolen.
The shower head was also broken in my room And the lamp didn't work.

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.positives: The room wasn't what we got confirmation on. Thankfully they moved us to the proper room BUT we didn't have bedding for the pull out couch. Only had 2 cleaning people at night and they left without telling management and it took over an hour to get some bedding. The air conditioner did not keep our room cool at all. We had to have a fan in our room to make it less miserable.

reviews.title: Nice facility. But staff needs to be better with communication.
reviews.negatives: Very loud. No room for anyway to swim or get in the hot tub. Even after the pool closed at 11pm there was still so much chaos and nose until about 1am. Then at about 7am the noise and chaos started up again. No one informed me there was a hockey team there on the pool level otherwise I could have changed my room. I was excited to have a getaway with my partner and very much so did not enjoy it because of all the noise and chaos all night long.

reviews.title: The room was dirty. We ate downstairs. It was grease. Terrible never again.
reviews.negatives: Our room was so dirty. There was hair in the toilet pizza crumbs all over the furniture and the coffee table. We had to go to another room and it was just a little bit better, but the floors did not even vacuumed. Never again will I stay at Doubletree?

reviews.title: Would not recommend this hotel.
reviews.negatives: No breakfast. Lots of charges made to my credit card. I guess there clientele are an untrusty lot.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
It had a very confusing layout, and I got lost several times. The room was alright except I did not get all the amenities that it said were available, for example I was looking for a balcony and I got this room but it did not have one.

The room had several dirty things like somebody left rose pedals under the bed, and it was visible, so the room was not cleaned properly. There was also tape on the ceiling, and the room was dirty.

reviews.title: Do not stay here.
reviews.positives: Location to my medical facility I was attending for the week
reviews.negatives:
Unclean. There was what I believe to be pink mold piles in my heat/ac vent. I became sick with upper respiratory infection which negatively impacted my entire reason of being there. For a intensive rehab program for a head injury. I tried to inform manager few times. But I encountered front desk staff that did not speak English well enough to understand that I was asking for manager. When I finally spoke to manager he said he would look into this and walked away from me. A nice front office staff that I first reported this to changed me to another room and told me to ask from manager.  Nick, was a manager that was kind, but referred me to his manager upon seeing the photos.

Unfortunately, this place was not clean. And there seemed to be no concern about exposing their clients to possible mold. I spent a lot of money for a medical procedure that was negatively impacted by my upper respiratory infection. And sadly the room had another paying customer that week. I know this as there was the do not disturb sign hung on door at times in mornings. I was moved one room over. 

The photo that is zoomed in was room 1206 heater vent with what I believe to be pink mold. Next photo is room 1208 with a normal heater vent with no pink stuff inside.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The room was very small. It seemed like the two beds were in a space much too small for them as one had to be pushed up against the wall. There seemed to be a large event of some kind going on and there was no time in the night where it was quiet. We had to call the front desk twice to tell our neighbors to turn off their music at 11 and 11:30 pm. There was screaming and partying and the walls were shaking as well as the glasses in our room from the music. There was also a very strong smell of marijuana that irritated our whole family's throats. There were people running up and down the halls during the night and doors slamming constantly. The loud music turned back on at 4 AM so we barely got any sleep. The bathroom was very small as well and the toilets flushed very loudly and were heard through both adjacent rooms and from the room above us.

reviews.title: won’t stay again
reviews.negatives: our room was filthy, food on the carpet, whirlpool didn’t work and was given a poolside room which we didn’t want

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: It was dirty and nothing like the photos

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Room not well cleaned.  Jacuzzi jets were very weak.  Overall prices were high for restaurant, snacks, etc
